steps.title: Use the contrast in the notes
steps.content: The student wants to contrast first-class and second-class levers. The relevant difference is placement: in first-class levers, the fulcrum is between effort and load; in second-class levers, the load is between effort and fulcrum.

steps.title: Reject non-contrasts
steps.content: Choice A contrasts effort and load, not the two lever types. Choice B says only that locations differ, without specifying how. Choice C states a similarity and uses an illogical contrast. The needed sentence states the precise placement difference. The answer is D.
